# Richard McKellar (mckellar.dev)

Richard McKellar is an AI adoption consultant, sales workflow automation builder, and Merchant Cash Advance (MCA) advisory specialist based in Morristown, New Jersey.

## Profile Details
- **Name**: Richard McKellar
- **Usernames**: therealmckellar, rmckellar
- **Location**: Morristown, NJ
- **Primary Website**: https://mckellar.dev
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/richardmckellar
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/therealmckellar

## Core Competencies & Offering
- **AI Adoption Consulting**: Implementing custom context-aware AI agent structures, training workforces on integrating AI tools into daily work, automating lead triage and routing, and workflow integration.
- **MCA Direct Lending Advisory**: Operational frameworks for launching and scaling direct funding operations, risk mitigation underwriting models, syndication capital networks.
- **MCA Brokerage Advisory**: Launching high-velocity brokerages, CRM setups and buildouts, ISO channel strategy, Salesforce/CRM scaling.
- **Start & Scale Advisory**: Launch plans and setups for new brokerages/funders, setup audits, capitalization and warehouse line strategies, and workforce onboarding frameworks.

## Professional Experience
- **Chief Revenue Officer (CRO)** at My Commercial Funding (Premium commercial lending & MCA platform)
- **Former VP & Executive Board Member** at Whetstone Holdings (DBA Everest Funding, Vader Funding, Granite Mountain Funding)
- **Asset Volume**: $100M+ personally funded MCA/RBF transactions
- **MCA advisory**: 15+ years of strategic alternative finance experience

## Advisory Publications
- "AI Agent Adoption: Resolving Friction in Underwriting Operations" (June 25, 2026)
- "Starting and Scaling as a Direct Funding Company" (June 20, 2026)
- "Workflow Audits: Mapping Automated Lead Triage Pipelines" (June 15, 2026)
- "CRM Setup and Buildout: CRM Scaling for MCA Operations" (June 10, 2026)
